source: Case Cards UH - SBIRT Client Generic Provider.pdf, p.3 'Alcohol - Complete Case 3'
verbatim_answers: Sometimes on the weekends—maybe a couple times a week
Monday's can be pretty tough so I would say most Monday's
I guess once a week or so
Yeah, usually at least once a week
Yeah, I got in a car accident a few months ago
Yeah, after my accident, my mom told me she thought I was drinking too much.
likes: Helps me relax; socialize with my friends
dislikes: Cost too much; my family complains about my use
